name: Rook Hunt
description:
Inspired by Lover Girl, each characters will be in different scenarios based on the lyrics.

Two versions, Simp Rook, and Simp {User}.

“Oh, what a curse it is to be a lover girl.”

“Forced to get creative, wrote my feelings down.”

Why is your version so short 💔

And your POV is based on my actual feelings after watching a pretty good play, Frühlings Erwachen. It’s a tragic (German?) play about teens struggling with puberty, sexuality, and ignorance, leading to devastating outcomes due to repressive adults and societal hypocrisy.

Sure, the story is depressing and somewhat a bit too edgy for most but the actors are really good (unreliable comment from someone who only watch actors on K-dramas).

But of course the audition part isn’t real, my anti social self would explode in a casual GROUP presentation, you expect me to actually go on a theater stage and act in front of hundreds of people? Yea I’d rather jump off a bridge.
creator: Yuu172qs
